chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.456 of 2024 (Abid Ali v. The State and others) _________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For hearing of cases 30.05.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Khan Jalbani, Advocate for the applicant Dr. Fiaz Shah, Prosecutor General assisted by Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP for the State a/w I.O of the case ========= It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that a supplementary charge sheet was furnished by the police, but it has been rejected by the IXth-Judicial Magistrate Central Karachi vide order dated 21.3.2024 with a non-speaking order and without providing a chance of hearing to the applicant, therefore, he would not press disposal of the instant Crl. Misc. Application before this Court on merits, provided learned trial Magistrate is directed to pass the same afresh by providing a chance of hearing to the applicant and all the concerned, which is not opposed by learned PG for the State. Having discussed above, the order dated 21.3.2024 passed by the learned trial Magistrate on supplementary challan is set aside with a direction to learned trial Magistrate to pass the same afresh with adequate reasoning by providing a chance of hearing to the applicant and all the concerned. The instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E nadir*
